title: Law Firm Digital Twin G2 ten-matter qualification campaign
objective: Qualify provider-neutral contracts, projections, validators, specialist mesh, and Cursor adapter specification for exactly ten varied synthetic employment-defense matters without crossing G2.

gold_standards.statement: Preserve G2 behavior and unrelated user work.
Only the world kernel owns canonical facts, authority, custody, and outcomes.
Exactly ten synthetic employment matters satisfy varied population and complexity bounds.
Operating and renderer projections expose no sealed truth, labels, or join keys.
Every artifact plan uses a qualified capability, fact allowlist, knowledge frontier, and custody lineage.
Locked seeds, manifests, and cassettes replay to identical hashes.
Voice checks reject template collapse, caricature, and stereotype proxies.
Write leases and controller receipts reconcile.
No external data, real identities, legal-authority claim, G3, publication, or deployment.

jobs.title: Bind baseline and human authority
jobs.objective: Produce immutable baseline, budget, and authority receipt.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Compile projection-separated manifests
jobs.objective: Implement manifest to sealed world plus least-privilege operating, renderer, and evaluation projections.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Implement evidence-family contracts
jobs.objective: Add channel, lineage, version, knowledge, and custody contracts at G2.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Implement persona state projections
jobs.objective: Add time-varying persona, relationship, organization, channel, memory, stress, and knowledge projections.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Lock projection-evidence-persona integration
jobs.objective: Prove the three portable cores compose through one typed, least-privilege pipeline before any corpus fixture is built.
non_goals: repair upstream source inside the integration job

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and all three cores compose
result_semantics.fail_terminal: protected invariant or upstream contract fails

jobs.title: Build ten sealed G2 blueprints
jobs.objective: Create exactly ten varied deterministic employment-defense blueprints and a public-safe corpus manifest.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Implement corpus Berean audit
jobs.objective: Add manifest, projection, continuity, population, voice, identity isolation, complexity, and replay findings.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Specify Cursor runtime adapter
jobs.objective: Translate ready jobs into bounded Cursor tasks while the controller alone owns leases, receipts, budgets, and advance.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

phases.title: Forward test and human launch boundary

waves.title: Forward test and human launch boundary

subwaves.title: Forward test and human launch boundary

jobs.title: Run clean forward test
jobs.objective: Prove replay, leakage resistance, scope, privacy, and protected G2 compatibility.

acceptance.rubric: Fresh-eyes rubric: correctness, non-leakage, scope, traceability, stops.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes

jobs.title: Prepare launch decision packet
jobs.objective: Reconcile receipts, budgets, leases, stops, qualifications, and gates without authorizing launch.

result_semantics.pass: required evidence exists and gate passes
